word: G505 - ἀνυπόκριτος - anypókritos - an-oo-pok'-ree-tos - Without dissimulation

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνυπόκριτος

- Transliteration: Anupokritos

- Phonetic: an-oo-pok'-ree-tos

- Definition:

1. unfeigned, undisguised, sincere

- Origin: from G1 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G5271

- TDNT entry: 17:30,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G5271; undissembled that is sincere: - without dissimulation (hypocrisy) unfeigned.
